grid_system.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-x-8 gap-y-16

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-full hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide text-sm uppercase
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary h-12 px-8 rounded-full hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-muted text-foreground hover:text-foreground/80 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.product: group relative bg-transparent border-none shadow-none rounded-none overflow-visible
cards.feature: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-border p-8 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/80 transition-all duration-500

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-input rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 focus:border-primary transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 h-auto text-lg

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

hero.alt: Minimalist beige podium with fern shadow

products.alt: Sophisticated aroma candle with white flowers

lifestyle.alt: Candle burning beside lamp in cozy room

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with 'ring-2 ring-accent ring-offset-2' class.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add Playfair Display and Inter from Google Fonts in index.html.
CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and font families specified above.
CLEAN SLATE: Remove default App.css styles. Use global CSS variables for colors.
COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, override default 'rounded-md' with 'rounded-lg' or 'rounded-full' based on component type.
NAVIGATION: Build a custom transparent-to-solid sticky navbar. Do not use a generic header.
HERO SECTION: Use a split layout or full-screen background image with overlay. Text must be readable.
PRODUCT CARDS: Do not use the default Card component. Create a custom minimal card: Image (aspect-[3/4]) -> Title (Playfair) -> Price (Inter). No borders, no shadows.
ADMIN DASHBOARD: Use a sidebar layout. Keep it clean but dense. Use the 'Secondary' color for the sidebar background.
DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or the grain texture overlay.
universal_guidelines: No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Text hierarchy: Huge Headings vs Small Details.
Micro-interactions on every button and link.
Images must have 'object-cover' and consistent aspect ratios.
Data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
NO LOREM IPSUM. Use real product names like 'Midnight Amber', 'Coastal Driftwood', 'Ivory Silk'.
